name: ComfyUI-Video-Frame-Extractor
description: A ComfyUI custom node that brings a DAW-style interactive video timeline directly into the node graph. Upload any video, scrub through it in real time, drag a loop region to define your extraction window, and pipe the resulting frame batch into any downstream node.
author: comfyuiattic-989

nodes.name: Video-Frame-Extractor
nodes.description: A DAW-style interactive video timeline directly into the node graph. Upload any video, scrub through it in real time, drag a loop region to define your extraction window, and pipe the resulting frame batch into any downstream node.
